home.description:
I am a Java Developer with more than three years of experience in the design, development, maintenance, and modernization of enterprise applications. I have hands-on experience with Java 8 and later versions, including Java 11+, as well as the Spring Framework ecosystem, particularly Spring Boot, Spring Data, and Spring Security. I also have strong expertise in designing and optimizing relational databases using Oracle and PostgreSQL, working with stored procedures, materialized views, and high-performance SQL queries.

In addition, I have experience developing modern frontend applications with Angular 16 and later versions, building responsive, scalable, and maintainable user interfaces. My technical background is complemented by solid knowledge of JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and Linux, along with experience containerizing and deploying applications using Docker and Docker Compose. I have also worked with cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure and Amazon Web Services (AWS), participating in application deployment and integration processes.

I am a proactive professional who adapts quickly to new technologies and development methodologies, with a strong commitment to software quality, best engineering practices, and continuous improvement. My goal is to contribute to an innovative organization where I can leverage my technical expertise, take on new challenges, and continue growing professionally in a collaborative, multicultural, and results-driven environment.
